{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "520443a2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Robust optimisation\n",
    "\n",
    "> **Uncertainty quantification plugs into every analysis.** A run is deterministic until you add a `uq_config`; with it, the analysis is evaluated over a small Stroud-3 quadrature of the uncertain geometry and returns a distribution (mean, standard deviation). The same pattern works for eigenmode, tuning, wakefield, and optimisation.\n",
    "\n",
    "**Robust optimisation** puts a `uq_config` inside the optimisation's `eigenmode_config`: every candidate is not just tuned and evaluated, it is evaluated *under uncertainty*, and ranked by a robust objective (mean + k·std) rather than the nominal value. The result is a Pareto front of designs that stay good across the tolerance band, not just at the nominal point.\n",
    "\n",
    "Kept tiny (a couple of candidates, one generation) so it runs in a few minutes — each candidate is a full UQ sweep."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "2d08ff8d",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:49:34.107436Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:49:34.107265Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.891626Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.890691Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Cavities, EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "38215658",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. The search space and the uncertainty\n",
    "\n",
    "Sweep the ellipse semi-axes `A, B`; tune `Req` to 1300 MHz for every candidate; minimise the peak-field ratios **under a 2% spread** on `A, B` (the `uq_config` nested in the eigenmode config)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "88edef7f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.894632Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.894262Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.908211Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.907373Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "cavs = Cavities(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'robust_opt'))\n",
    "midcell = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 103.353]\n",
    "cavs.add_cavity([EllipticalCavity(1, midcell, midcell, midcell, beampipe='none')], ['TESLA'])\n",
    "\n",
    "config = {\n",
    "    'initial_points': 2, 'no_of_generation': 1,\n",
    "    'method': {'LHS': {'seed': 5}},\n",
    "    'bounds': {'A': [40, 46], 'B': [40, 46]},\n",
    "    'objectives': [['min', 'monopole:Epk/Eacc []'],\n",
    "                   ['min', 'monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]']],\n",
    "    'tune_config': {\n",
    "        'freqs': 1300.0, 'cell_type': {'mid-cell': 'Req'}, 'processes': 1,\n",
    "        'eigenmode_config': {\n",
    "            'n_cells': 1, 'processes': 1, 'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "            'uq_config': {\n",
    "                'variables': ['A', 'B'],\n",
    "                'objectives': ['monopole:Epk/Eacc []', 'monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]'],\n",
    "                'method': ['stroud3'], 'delta': [0.02, 0.02], 'processes': 1,\n",
    "                'cell_type': 'mid-cell', 'cell_complexity': 'simplecell',\n",
    "            },\n",
    "        },\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'mutation_factor': 2, 'crossover_factor': 2, 'elites_for_crossover': 2,\n",
    "    'chaos_factor': 2, 'weights': [1, 1],\n",
    "}"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ddda745c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Run it"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "b04fc0dd",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.910757Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:49:35.910553Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.499265Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.498476Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\r",
      "  0%|          | 0/1 [00:00<?, ?it/s]"
     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\r",
      "100%|██████████| 1/1 [01:46<00:00, 106.31s/it]"
     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "evaluated candidates: 2\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cavs.run_optimisation(config)\n",
    "opt = cavs.optimisation\n",
    "print(f'evaluated candidates: {len(opt.history)}')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cabd3653",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. Robust objective columns\n",
    "\n",
    "For each objective the history now carries the **mean** `E[...]`, the **standard deviation** `std[...]`, and the **robust value** `E[...] + 6·std[...]` that the candidates are ranked by — so a design with a slightly worse nominal but a much tighter spread can win."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "2a7f3895",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.501025Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.500854Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.511422Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.510883Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<div>\n",

       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",

       "      <td>0.0164</td>\n",
       "      <td>2.1294</td>\n",

       "      <td>4.1615</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </tbody>\n",
       "</table>\n",
       "</div>"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "   E[monopole:Epk/Eacc []]  std[monopole:Epk/Eacc []]  \\\n",
       "0                    2.031                     0.0164   \n",
       "1                    2.031                     0.0164   \n",
       "\n",
       "   E[monopole:Epk/Eacc []] + 6*std[monopole:Epk/Eacc []]  \\\n",
       "0                                             2.1294       \n",
       "1                                             2.1294       \n",
       "\n",
       "   E[monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]]  std[monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]]  \\\n",
       "0                          4.1584                            0.0005   \n",
       "1                          4.1584                            0.0005   \n",
       "\n",
       "   E[monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]] + 6*std[monopole:Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]]  \n",
       "0                                             4.1615                    \n",
       "1                                             4.1615                    "
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cols = [c for c in opt.history.columns\n",
    "        if c.startswith(('E[', 'std['))]\n",
    "opt.history[cols].round(4)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "717494ee",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. The Pareto front (robust objectives)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "2f3e7f18",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.513283Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.513116Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.618676Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:51:22.618104Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [

     "data": {

       "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "opt.plot_pareto(kind='scatter', normalise=False)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
